figures.caption: Fig. 1. Active Source-free Open-set Domain Adaptation in medical image segmentation. (A) Active Open-set Query strategy: After test time augmentation was employed, Class-aware Aleatoric Uncertainty and Class-aware Epistemic Uncertainty were measured, and combined to measure Class-aware Decomposed Uncertainty. Class-agnostic Prototype Discrepancy measured self-domain discrepancy and cross-domain discrepancy among low- and high-uncertainty samples. (B) Targetrefined Self-training: Target samples with high scores were selected for annotation Tl = {(Xl,Y l)} and training the network, and then this network regenerated and refined pseudo-labels for unselected samples with low scores Tu = {(Xu,Y u)}. Finally, labeled and pseudo-labeled samples were combined for semi-supervised training.
